title: CentOS need EPEL repo
body: With CentOS, `bats` is only in EPEL repo

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@PascalBourdier Thanks for your PR. We require the commit to be signed.

```
git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force
```

LGTM

@PascalBourdier can you amend your commit using `git commit --amend -s` to add a "Signed-off-by:" to the commit log?  The CI checks for that to ensure that every patch comes from someone who has the rights to send it, and the "Signed-off-by:" is how that's indicated.  Thanks!

:pushpin: Commit 87c04d2 has been approved by `nalind`
